title: S2-T7 dependency-cruiser CI guard for substrate purity
description: .dependency-cruiser.cjs root · block peripheral-events from importing next/react/@solana · block medium-blink from world-sources direct. CI synthetic-violation test. Source: kickoff §T7.
close_reason: S2-T7 complete via eslint-plugin-import (NOT dependency-cruiser · node 23.3.0 incompat with depcruise@>=16) · boundary rules in eslint.config.mjs use no-restricted-imports patterns: peripheral-events MUST NOT import next/* · react/* · @solana/* · @metaplex-foundation/* (substrate-purity per SDD HIGH-1) · medium-blink MUST NOT import @purupuru/world-sources directly (cmp-boundary · all reads through WorldEvent) · synthetic violation tests proven both directions (substrate import 'react' fires substrate rule with exact T7 message · medium-blink import '@purupuru/world-sources' fires cmp-boundary rule) · pnpm lint passes with 0 errors (8 warnings in pre-existing fixtures · all in evals/ + Sp1 spike code) · also fixed pre-existing eslint config bug (eslint/config subpath needs ≥9.10 but installed is 9.0.0 · rewrote without eslint/config import per MAY-LATITUDE-1 micro-fix) + bazi-resolver.ts require() → top-level import + 4 lint errors in this session's code (nonce-store @ts-expect-error description · sp2-claim unused vars + as-any disable comment)
